scripts.build:production: pnpm nx run ghost:build:tsc && pnpm nx run ghost:build:assets && pnpm nx run @tryghost/admin:build
scripts.dev:sqlite: DEV_COMPOSE_FILES='-f compose.dev.sqlite.yaml' pnpm nx run ghost-monorepo:docker:dev
scripts.dev:mailgun: DEV_COMPOSE_FILES='-f compose.dev.mailgun.yaml' pnpm nx run ghost-monorepo:docker:dev
scripts.dev:analytics: DEV_COMPOSE_FILES='-f compose.dev.analytics.yaml' pnpm nx run ghost-monorepo:docker:dev
scripts.dev:storage: DEV_COMPOSE_FILES='-f compose.dev.storage.yaml' pnpm nx run ghost-monorepo:docker:dev
scripts.dev:all: DEV_COMPOSE_FILES='-f compose.dev.analytics.yaml -f compose.dev.storage.yaml' ./docker/stripe/with-stripe.sh pnpm nx run ghost-monorepo:docker:dev
scripts.dev:daemon: NX_DAEMON=true NX_TUI=false NX_DEFAULT_OUTPUT_STYLE=stream pnpm nx run ghost-monorepo:docker:dev
scripts.fix: pnpm store prune && rimraf -g '**/node_modules' && pnpm install && pnpm nx reset
scripts.reset:db: docker exec ghost-dev bash -c 'cd /home/ghost/ghost/core && pnpm knex-migrator reset && pnpm knex-migrator init'
scripts.reset:db:volume: docker compose -f compose.dev.yaml ${DEV_COMPOSE_FILES} down && docker volume rm ghost-dev_mysql-data
scripts.reset:data: docker exec ghost-dev bash -c 'cd /home/ghost/ghost/core && node index.js generate-data --clear-database --quantities members:1000,posts:100 --seed 123'
scripts.reset:data:empty: docker exec ghost-dev bash -c 'cd /home/ghost/ghost/core && node index.js generate-data --clear-database --quantities members:0,posts:0 --seed 123'
scripts.reset:data:xxl: docker exec ghost-dev bash -c 'cd /home/ghost/ghost/core && node index.js generate-data --clear-database --quantities members:2000000,posts:0,emails:0,members_stripe_customers:0,members_login_events:0,members_status_events:0 --seed 123'
scripts.seed:multi-sub-scenarios: docker exec ghost-dev bash -c 'cd /home/ghost/ghost/core && node scripts/seed-multi-sub-scenarios.js'
scripts.docker:clean: docker compose -f compose.dev.yaml ${DEV_COMPOSE_FILES} --profile all down -v --remove-orphans --rmi local
scripts.docker:rebase: git fetch ${GHOST_UPSTREAM:-origin} main && git rebase ${GHOST_UPSTREAM:-origin}/main && pnpm install && pnpm nx run-many -t build --projects=@tryghost/shade,@tryghost/admin-x-design-system,@tryghost/admin-x-framework && docker compose -f compose.dev.yaml ${DEV_COMPOSE_FILES} up -d --build --force-recreate ghost-dev
scripts.main:monorepo: git checkout main && git pull ${GHOST_UPSTREAM:-origin} main && pnpm install
scripts.main:submodules: git submodule sync && git submodule update && git submodule foreach "git checkout main && git pull ${GHOST_UPSTREAM:-origin} main"
scripts.tb: tb local start && cd ghost/core/core/server/data/tinybird && tb dev

options.command: trap 'docker compose -f compose.dev.yaml ${DEV_COMPOSE_FILES} down' EXIT; docker compose -f compose.dev.yaml ${DEV_COMPOSE_FILES} logs -f
